## AggregatedResultMap.getOrAdd() method

Gets an existing item or adds a new one using a factory.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getOrAdd(key: TCOMPOSITEID, factory: (key: TITEMID) => Result<TITEM>): DetailedResult<TITEM, ResultMapResultDetail>;
```
